# zabbix_host_group (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix host group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_host_group" "linux_servers" {
  name = "Linux servers"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the host group. Must be unique within Zabbix.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the host group.
